title: [LLHD] Refactor enum class and move header file locations.
body:
Refactor `enum TraceMode` to `enum class TraceMode` to enrich
  the readability. And move header files to avoid re-declare like
  enum TraceFormat.

 Currently, there exists two enum type related to TraceMode.
 `enum TraceMode` in Trace.h and `enum TraceFormat` in llhd-sim.cpp.
 Combine with `enum class TraceMode` .
